MAT is the most complex module тАФ it has substantial documented stage history. Must preserve historical completion records while aligning to new stage numbers. |

## Section 3 тАФ FFA (Final Findings Attestation) Checks IAA Will Run at Handover

IAA will execute the following checks in Phase 3 when invoked at handover. Builders should self-check against these before submitting.

### Universal Ceremony Gate (all PRs)

| Check | What IAA Verifies |
|-------|-------------------|
| CERT-01: PREHANDOVER proof present | A `PREHANDOVER_PROOF_[SLUG].md` file committed to the PR root. Not empty. Not placeholder. |
| CERT-02: Producing agent(s) declared | PREHANDOVER proof names mat-specialist and governance-liaison-isms-agent as the producing agents with their delegation scopes stated. |
| CERT-03: IAA Pre-Brief cross-reference | PREHANDOVER proof references this pre-brief artifact: `iaa-prebrief-align-12stage-prebuild-20260406.md`. Token field uses expected reference format: `IAA-[session-id]-align-12stage-prebuild-20260406-PASS`. |
| CERT-04: Issue/branch alignment | PR is on branch `copilot/align-live-maturation-artifacts` and references issue #1255. |
| CERT-05: Scope boundary respected | No production code, schema, or test files modified. No canon files modified. No agent contract files modified. CI/workflow files unchanged. |

| Rule | Check |
|------|-------|
| A-001 | IAA invocation evidence present in PREHANDOVER proof (this pre-brief is the evidence тАФ must be referenced) |
| A-002 | No class-exemption claims made. All agents producing artifacts have IAA oversight. |

| A-029 | PREHANDOVER `iaa_audit_token` populated with expected reference (not `PENDING`); IAA writes verdict to dedicated token file |

## Section 4 тАФ Required PREHANDOVER Proof Structure

The delegated agents (mat-specialist and governance-liaison-isms-agent) must jointly produce a single PREHANDOVER proof file. File name: `PREHANDOVER_PROOF_ALIGN_12STAGE_PREBUILD.md` (or `PREHANDOVER_PROOF_WAVE_1255.md`).

**Mandatory fields:**

```yaml
session_id: session-[NNN]-align-12stage-prebuild-20260406
date: [YYYY-MM-DD]
wave: align-12stage-prebuild-20260406
branch: copilot/align-live-maturation-artifacts
issue: "1255"
pr_title: "Align live maturion-isms module artifacts to the canonical 12-stage pre-build model"

producing_agents:
  - agent: mat-specialist
    scope: modules/mat/BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER.md
    role: MAT tracker stage remapping
  - agent: governance-liaison-isms-agent
    scope: >
      MODULE_CLASSIFICATION.md + all non-MAT module BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER.md updates
      (modules/pit, maturity-roadmap, MMM, amc, course-crafter, incident-intelligence,
       isms, risk-management, xdetect, packages/ai-centre)
    role: Classification and tracker alignment

iaa_audit_token: IAA-session-[NNN]-align-12stage-prebuild-20260406-PASS
iaa_prebrief_reference: .agent-admin/assurance/iaa-prebrief-align-12stage-prebuild-20260406.md

governance_reference: governance/canon/PRE_BUILD_STAGE_MODEL_CANON.md v1.0.0
template_reference: governance/templates/BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER_TEMPLATE.md

scope_boundary_attested: true
scope_boundary_declaration: >
  This PR contains ONLY: MODULE_CLASSIFICATION.md (new file), and updated
  BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER.md files for all in-scope modules. No production code,
  schema, test, canon, agent contract, or CI/workflow files are modified.

fail_only_once_attested: true
fail_only_once_rules_applied:
  - A-001: IAA invocation evidence present (this prebrief committed before build tasks)
  - A-002: No class-exemption claims
  - A-003: No EXEMPT classification without unambiguous justification
  - A-029: iaa_audit_token populated with expected reference; PREHANDOVER is read-only post-commit

deliverables_checklist:
  - [ ] MODULE_CLASSIFICATION.md тАФ all 11 modules + ai-centre package classified
  - [ ] modules/mat/BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER.md тАФ 12-stage format with stage mapping addendum
  - [ ] modules/mat/00-app-description/BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER.md тАФ duplicate resolved
  - [ ] modules/pit/BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER.md тАФ 12-stage format applied
  - [ ] modules/maturity-roadmap/BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER.md тАФ 12-stage format applied
  - [ ] modules/MMM/BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER.md тАФ content anomaly corrected + 12-stage format
  - [ ] modules/amc/BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER.md тАФ 12-stage format applied
  - [ ] modules/course-crafter/BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER.md тАФ 12-stage format applied
  - [ ] modules/incident-intelligence/BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER.md тАФ 12-stage format applied
  - [ ] modules/isms/BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER.md тАФ 12-stage format applied
  - [ ] modules/risk-management/BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER.md тАФ 12-stage format applied
  - [ ] modules/xdetect/BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER.md тАФ 12-stage format applied
  - [ ] packages/ai-centre/BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER.md тАФ format addressed (see ┬зBlocker 4)

module_classification_summary: |
  [To be populated by governance-liaison-isms-agent in Task A]
  Format: | Module | Classification | Justification |

mat_stage_mapping_table: |
  [To be populated by mat-specialist in Task B]
  Format: | Old Stage | Old Name | New Stage | New Name | Completion Status |
```

## Section 5 тАФ Scope Blockers and Governance Conflicts

The following items were identified during pre-brief review and must be resolved by the delegated agents. IAA will verify resolution at handover.

### ЁЯЪи Blocker 1 тАФ MMM BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER content anomaly

**Status**: MUST FIX before handover  
**File**: `modules/MMM/BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER.md`  
**Finding**: This file declares `Module: Risk Management` and `Module Slug: risk-management` тАФ it contains the risk-management tracker content, not MMM content. It was copied without modification.  
**Required Action**: governance-liaison-isms-agent must create a correct MMM tracker. The MMM module also has a strategy document (`modules/MMM/MMM_strategy.md` v0.1.0 тАФ DRAFT) that defines MMM as a convergence of MAT + Maturity Roadmap. The tracker must reflect the MMM module identity, not risk-management.  
**IAA Check at Handover**: AAWP-09 тАФ will fail if not corrected.

---

### тЪая╕П Blocker 2 тАФ MAT duplicate tracker

**Status**: MUST RESOLVE before handover  
**Files**: `modules/mat/BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER.md` (root) AND `modules/mat/00-app-description/BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER.md`  
**Finding**: Two copies of the MAT BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER exist. The `00-app-description/` copy is likely a remnant from early module structure scaffolding.  
**Required Action**: mat-specialist must either: (a) delete the `00-app-description/BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER.md` copy with a clear rationale in the PREHANDOVER proof, OR (b) clarify its distinct purpose if it serves a different function. IAA will not accept two active tracker files for the same module scope without explicit justification.  
**IAA Check at Handover**: AAWP-08 тАФ will fail if not resolved.

---

### тЪая╕П Blocker 3 тАФ MODULE_CLASSIFICATION.md placement

**Status**: MUST DECLARE before handover  
**Finding**: The issue states MODULE_CLASSIFICATION.md as a planned deliverable but does not specify its exact path. Possible locations: repository root, `modules/`, `.agent-admin/`, or `governance/`.  
**Required Action**: governance-liaison-isms-agent must choose a canonical path and declare it in the PREHANDOVER proof. IAA recommendation: `modules/MODULE_CLASSIFICATION.md` (alongside the tracker files it references) or `governance/MODULE_CLASSIFICATION.md` (if it is intended as a governance artifact). The chosen path must be consistent with the content (module classification is lifecycle governance, not code).  
**IAA Check at Handover**: CERT-01 and CORE-018 тАФ IAA will verify the declared path matches the committed file.

---

### тЪая╕П Blocker 4 тАФ packages/ai-centre/BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER.md format divergence

**Status**: MUST DECLARE intent before handover  
**Finding**: The ai-centre tracker uses a **wave-build progress table** format (Wave 1, Wave 2 ... Wave 9.11, etc.) rather than a lifecycle stage tracker. This is a materially different document format serving a different tracking purpose (build wave progress vs. pre-build lifecycle stage readiness).  
**IAA Position**: IAA does NOT require governance-liaison to convert this to the 12-stage lifecycle format if the module classification declares ai-centre as `fresh-start-on-next-stage` or `historical-exempt` for the pre-build lifecycle tracker. However, if ai-centre is declared `retrofit-now`, then the lifecycle tracker format must be applied.  
**Required Action**: governance-liaison-isms-agent must: (a) classify `packages/ai-centre` in MODULE_CLASSIFICATION.md, (b) declare the intent for the ai-centre tracker in the PREHANDOVER proof (convert / fresh-start / exempt), and (c) apply that intent consistently.  
**IAA Check at Handover**: AAWP-07 тАФ will check that intent is declared and applied.

---

### тД╣я╕П Advisory 1 тАФ Stage 2 (UX Workflow & Wiring Spec) is new to all existing modules

**Status**: Advisory тАФ must be explicitly addressed, not silently skipped  
**Finding**: The old model had no UX Workflow & Wiring Spec stage. All existing modules will have `Stage 2: NOT_STARTED` in their updated trackers. This is correct and expected.  
**Required Action**: The updated trackers must explicitly state Stage 2 status as `NOT_STARTED` (not omit the stage). Active modules (MAT, PIT) should include a note indicating that UX Workflow & Wiring Spec is a gap to be addressed on next stage/version work.  
**IAA Check at Handover**: AAWP-03 тАФ will fail if Stage 2 is missing from any active module tracker.

---

### тД╣я╕П Advisory 2 тАФ MAT stage mapping is the highest complexity task

**Status**: Advisory тАФ for mat-specialist guidance  
**Current MAT old-to-new mapping** (IAA computed for builder guidance):

| Old Stage | Old Name | New Stage | New Name |
|-----------|----------|-----------|----------|
| Stage 0 | App Description | Stage 1 | App Description |
| Stage 1 | FRS | Stage 3 | Functional Requirements Specification (FRS) |
| Stage 1.5 | TRS | Stage 4 | Technical Requirements Specification (TRS) |
| Stage 2 | Architecture | Stage 5 | Architecture |
| Stage 2.5 | QA-to-Red | Stage 6 | QA-to-Red |
| (PBFAG тАФ inserted post-Stage 2.5) | PBFAG | Stage 7 | PBFAG |
| Stage 3 | Implementation Plan | Stage 8 | Implementation Plan |
| Stage 4 | Builder Checklist | Stage 9 | Builder Checklist |
| (absent) | тАФ | Stage 2 | UX Workflow & Wiring Spec |
| (absent) | тАФ | Stage 10 | IAA Pre-Brief |
| (absent) | тАФ | Stage 11 | Builder Appointment |
| (Build) | Build (active waves) | Stage 12 | Build |

**Note**: Stage 2 (UX Workflow & Wiring Spec) was not in the old model and will be NOT_STARTED for MAT. Stages 10 (IAA Pre-Brief), 11 (Builder Appointment) are new stages тАФ MAT is currently IN BUILD (Stage 12) so these pre-build stages must be declared retroactively as `COMPLETE` (since MAT build is active, these stages were effectively performed informally) OR declared `HISTORICAL - PERFORMED INFORMALLY - PRE-MODEL`. mat-specialist must choose the appropriate status and justify.  
**IAA Check at Handover**: AAWP-01, AAWP-02 тАФ will verify mapping is present and correct.

---

### тД╣я╕П Advisory 3 тАФ PIT tracker uses old Stage 1.5 (TRS) with "NEW STAGE" note

**Status**: Advisory тАФ for governance-liaison guidance  
**Finding**: PIT tracker already notes Stage 1.5 as "NEW STAGE тАФ Folder needs to be created." This shows the module is mid-transition. Under the new 12-stage model, Stage 1.5 maps to Stage 4 (TRS). The "NEW STAGE" note should be preserved in the notes field of Stage 4 for historical context.  
**Required Action**: Preserve the "NEW STAGE" note as a historical note in Stage 4. Status should reflect the actual state (NOT_STARTED for TRS in PIT).

## Section 7 тАФ Module Pre-Classification Observations

The following observations are provided for builder guidance. These are NOT binding classifications тАФ Task A (MODULE_CLASSIFICATION.md) is the authoritative classification. IAA provides these as a starting point.

| Module | IAA Pre-Observation | Basis |
|--------|---------------------|-------|
| MAT | `retrofit-now` тАФ active, mid-build, most advanced | Currently at Stage 12 (Build), v1.9 tracker, many completed stages |
| PIT | `retrofit-now` тАФ active, App Description complete | Tracker last updated 2026-02-13; has partial stage history |
| Maturity Roadmap | `retrofit-now` OR `fresh-start-on-next-stage` | Stage 0 complete, Stage 1 in-progress. Governance-liaison to determine. MMM_strategy.md notes convergence planned. |
| MMM | Pending тАФ content anomaly means classification deferred until file is corrected | `modules/MMM/MMM_strategy.md` indicates active convergence strategy at DRAFT v0.1.0. CS2 to confirm classification intent. |
| AMC | `fresh-start-on-next-stage` тАФ Governance foundation complete, all build waves PENDING CS2 wave-start | No FRS/TRS/Architecture stages begun |
| Course Crafter | `retrofit-now` OR `fresh-start-on-next-stage` | Stage 0 complete, Stage 1 in-progress. Last updated 2026-02-13. |
| Incident Intelligence | `retrofit-now` OR `fresh-start-on-next-stage` | Stage 0 complete, Stage 1 in-progress. Last updated 2026-02-13. Wave 9.9 (AIMC integration) PENDING. |
| ISMS | `retrofit-now` OR `fresh-start-on-next-stage` | Stage 0 complete, Stage 1 in-progress. Last updated 2026-02-13. |
| Risk Management | `retrofit-now` OR `fresh-start-on-next-stage` | Stage 0 complete, Stage 1 in-progress. Last updated 2026-02-13. AIMC Wave 9.6 complete. |
| XDetect | `retrofit-now` OR `fresh-start-on-next-stage` | Stage 0 complete, Stage 1 in-progress. Last updated 2026-02-13. AIMC Wave 9.6 complete. |
| ai-centre (package) | `historical-exempt` from lifecycle stage format OR `fresh-start-on-next-stage` | Wave-build format is appropriate for a shared package; lifecycle format designed for app modules. CS2 to confirm. |

**Note**: governance-liaison-isms-agent has authority to finalise classifications per delegation. All `retrofit-now` / `fresh-start-on-next-stage` determinations where IAA shows ambiguity should be escalated to CS2 if governance-liaison is uncertain.
